landing.heroDescription: Join daily leagues with friends. No complication, just play.
landing.howLeaguesStep1Desc: Set up a league in seconds and invite friends with a code.
landing.howLeaguesStep2Desc: Everyone throws 9 darts (3x3) whenever they want during the day.
landing.howLeaguesStep3Desc: Scores are tracked automatically. Who tops the table at the end of the week?

landing.tagline: The easiest way to play darts online
landing.whyUs1Desc: Record your daily throws with your camera. Simple, secure, and fair.
landing.whyUs2Desc: No complex signups. Just invite friends and start throwing.
landing.whyUs3Desc: Create private leagues, track standings, and see who climbs the leaderboard.

privacyPolicy.li1: Account Data: We collect your email address and profile details (such as display name, country, country timezone, and avatar URL when available) to create your profile.
privacyPolicy.li2: Game Data: We store your throw history, statistics, and league participation data to provide core service features, including automatic placement in global and country leagues.
privacyPolicy.li3: Video Data: Some leagues may require video recording for verification. If a league requires video, clips are stored so league members can view them during the active season. For completed system leagues, historical video references are removed.
privacyPolicy.li7: Training Data: Tic-Tac-Toe training runs locally in your browser session in this version and is not sent to our backend.
privacyPolicy.li8: Usage Data: We use Google Analytics to understand app usage, including page views, device/browser information, and approximate location.
privacyPolicy.li4: Supabase: Used for our database, authentication, and secure data storage.
privacyPolicy.li5: Google OAuth: Optional sign-in provider for secure authentication.
privacyPolicy.li6: Supabase Storage: Used for storing throw verification videos securely.
privacyPolicy.li9: Google Analytics: Used for traffic and behavior analytics. We have enabled IP anonymization where supported.
privacyPolicy.s1Text: Welcome to DartStreak ("we," "our," or "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we look after your personal data when you visit our application and tells you about your privacy rights.
privacyPolicy.s3Text: We rely on trusted third-party services to operate DartStreak:
privacyPolicy.s4Text: You have the right to request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time. You can do this directly within your profile settings or by contacting us.
privacyPolicy.s5Text: Analytics cookies are only used after you give consent in our cookie banner. You can change your choice at any time from Cookie Settings in the app.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.s6Text: When you set your country, we may automatically place you in a global league and a country league. System leagues use fixed league timezones for weekly seasons.
privacyPolicy.li10: Language Preference Data: We store your selected app language in your browser local storage so the app can remember your choice across visits.

terms.li1: Cheat, manipulate scores, or use automated bots.
terms.li2: Harass, bully, or use hate speech against other players.
terms.li3: Upload or broadcast inappropriate, offensive, or illegal content.
terms.li4: Your Content: You retain all ownership rights to the content you create (e.g., your match history, user profile).
terms.li5: Our Content: The DartStreak code, design, and logic are authored by the DartStreak team.
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using DartStreak, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
terms.s2Text1: DartStreak is a free, hobbyist project provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without any warranties of any kind.
terms.s2Text2: We cannot guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free. We are not liable for any data loss or service interruptions.
terms.s3Text: We value fair play and sportsmanship. By using DartStreak, you agree NOT to:
terms.s3Text2: We reserve the right to ban any user who violates these rules.
terms.title: Terms of Service

ticTacToe.title: Tic-Tac-Toe Darts
ticTacToe.description: Two-player target control where each round is decided by board management and checkout precision.

board.lockNow: On target now - lock this square.

expert_checkouts.description: Random checkouts between 41-80. Finish on a double.
expert_checkouts.label: Checkouts (Expert 41-80)

pro_checkouts.description: Random checkouts between 81-120. Finish on a double.
pro_checkouts.label: Checkouts (Pro 81-120)

setup.subtitle: Choose names and colors for both teams before starting.
setup.title: Set up teams

result.subtitle: Tap below to continue with a new board.

rules.r2: Register each dart with Single/Double/Triple and board numbers 1-20.
rules.r3: If your running total no longer matches an open square, the queued claim is lost.
rules.r4: Lock the queued square at any time, or it auto-locks after throw 3 if still valid.
rules.title: How it works

turn.selectHint: Register each dart below. Use MISS if you don't score.
